comments.text: Leech also showed that $\lim F(N) / N^{1/2} = \inf (F(N)+2)/(N+1)^{1/2}$. This is rather striking because if the limit is $\sqrt 3$ (as mildly suggested by computational evidence) then in fact from the infimum formula and Wichman's result it follows that $F(N) = \sqrt{3N} + O(1)$.
Leech's lower bound (for the unrestricted problem) was improved by about $10^{-3}$ by Bernshteyn and Tait in 2019: see https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jnt.2019.05.002.
